question: How should the Kanban board and the existing list view relate on the Dashboard?
options: Toggle control on the Dashboard that switches between List and Kanban (Kanban is default)
Toggle control on the Dashboard that switches between List and Kanban (List stays default, Kanban opt-in)
Separate /kanban route, List remains on the Dashboard as-is
Replace the List entirely with the Kanban board
Other

question: The existing FeatureCard is a clickable Link to the detail page. Should the Kanban cards preserve this, and what should clicking do?
options: Click card navigates to /features/:id detail page (same as list today)
Click card opens a detail popover/panel without leaving the board
Click card navigates to detail; also an inline hover preview of the next gate
Other

question: Features have a current_phase (inception..delivery) AND a status (draft, in_progress, gate_blocked, passed, failed, done, recirculated, cancelled, waiting_for_human). What defines a column?
options: Columns = the 6 phases (Inception, Planning, Construction, Review, Testing, Delivery); status shown as badge on card
Columns = status (In Progress, Gate Blocked, Waiting, Done, etc.) regardless of phase
Columns = phase, with a separate swimlane per status
Other

question: Should a feature appear in only one column, or can it occupy multiple (e.g. gate_blocked in current phase AND a recirculate target)?
options: Exactly one column — the feature's current_phase
Exactly one column — current_phase, but visually flagged (color/icon) when gate_blocked or waiting_for_human
Multiple columns allowed (current + next blocked target)
Other

question: Should the Kanban board support drag-and-drop to move features between phases, or is it view-only (read-only board)?
options: View-only — no drag, phase transitions happen only via the pipeline
Drag-and-drop to advance phase (guarded by the same gate rules as /advance)
Drag allowed but only as a visual reorder, not a state change
Other

question: A feature can be in current_phase=planning but phase_states show inception done, planning in_progress. What should the card surface?
options: Title, priority badge, status badge, pending-questions badge (reuse existing card chrome)
Above + gate result indicator (passed/failed) for the current phase
Above + last-updated timestamp and processing-mode (autonomous/interactive)
Other

question: Columns can get tall. How should large column content be handled?
options: Vertical scroll within each column (board height fixed to viewport)
Page scrolls vertically as a whole; columns grow indefinitely
Cap visible cards per column with a '+N more' overflow that expands
Other

question: Empty columns (no feature in, say, Testing) — what does the user see?
options: Column header present, body shows muted 'No features' placeholder
Column header present, body empty (blank)
Hide the column entirely when empty
Other

question: How should the Kanban board and the existing list view relate on the Dashboard?
options: Toggle control on the Dashboard that switches between List and Kanban (Kanban is default)
Toggle control on the Dashboard that switches between List and Kanban (List stays default, Kanban opt-in)
Separate /kanban route, List remains on the Dashboard as-is
Replace the List entirely with the Kanban board
Other
answer: Toggle control on the Dashboard that switches between List and Kanban (Kanban is default)
